title: MARIJUANA ANONYMOUS - 211info
text: MARIJUANA ANONYMOUS WORLD SERVICES MARIJUANA ANONYMOUS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 12-Step program modeled after Alcoholics Anonymous to help those with a desire to stop using marijuana. Website provides listings for local meetings by state. Online meetings are also available. 5551 Hollywood Boulevard #1043 Hollywood, CA 900286814 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email - (800) 766-6779 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Toll-free (800) 766-6779 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None. Contributions accepted from members. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Danish, French, Icelandic, Japanese, Persian, Polish, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Drug Use Disorder Support Groups If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
